|F_n(x)-F_0(x)|.description: Absolute differences between the empirical CDF F_n(x) and theoretical CDF F_0(x) at each failure time, from Table 3.8. The maximum of these values gives D_n.

n.description: Sample size (number of failure times), used to look up the critical value in Table A.4.

alpha.description: Significance level (5%) used to determine the critical value d_{n,alpha} from Table A.4.

d_n_alpha_table.description: Critical value from Table A.4 for n=10 and alpha=0.05 in the KS test.
